report.summary: Day 72 standup v2: Full cycle completed since v1 — all 6 agents ran. 4 pages shipped (2 built + 2 promoted). PUBLISH_QUEUE drained to 0. BTC recovered to ~$70,335 (+1.1% from v1). Fear & Greed ticked up to 11 (still Extreme Fear, streak now ~49 days). Git locks persist Day 10 — deploy gap ~163 pages. Today's spend: $542 human-equivalent (7 agent runs). Priority: git lock clearance remains P0.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE STANDUP v1 (earlier today): All 6 agents completed 1 full cycle. Build shipped 2 pages, publish promoted 2 pages, design created 3 OG images + 4 UX fixes, community drafted 6 social posts + 3 SVG cards + newsletter v23, EOD confirmed QA pass.

MARKET UPDATE (fresh): BTC ~$70,335 (recovered from $69,541 at v1 — +1.1%). ETH ~$2,133-$2,177. Fear & Greed Index: 11 (up from 8, still Extreme Fear — Day ~49 record streak). Total market cap: $2.44T (up from $2.36T). $400M liquidations hit over weekend but market rebounding. Trump postponed Iran strikes — relief rally driver.

NEWS: Fed Governor Miran speaking at Digital Asset Summit NYC today. House tokenization hearing held. CLARITY Act stablecoin yield 99% resolved but Senate Republicans attaching community bank deregulation. Humanity (H) unlocking $10.1M tokens today. Morgan Stanley MSBT S-1 amendment filed.
QUEUE STATUS: PUBLISH_QUEUE drained to 0 (was 2 at v1 — ERC-8183 + Crypto Retirement promoted). Ready for next build cycle to refill.
LOCAL METRICS: 1,154 page.tsx files (+2 from v1). 506 published slugs (+5 from yesterday). Deploy gap: ~163 pages (last commit e999560, Mar 17).
EGRESS: Web search working — market data fresh as of this cycle.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: DONE SINCE v1: Build shipped Morgan Stanley MSBT ETF Guide + Onchain Credit Scoring Guide. Publish promoted ERC-8183 + Crypto Retirement from queue. Design created 3 OG images (MSBT, Credit Scoring, L3 Chains) + fixed 4 UX issues (semantic HTML, breadcrumbs, server-component handlers, OG refs). Community drafted 6 social posts (#110-115), newsletter v23, 3 SVG cards, content calendar v28. EOD QA confirmed all clean.

PIPELINE HEALTH: PUBLISH_QUEUE empty — next build will refill. 506 slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES. 1,154 page.tsx files. Today's output: 2 guides, 3 OG images, 6 social posts, 3 SVG cards, 1 newsletter, 4 UX fixes.
TOTAL INVENTORY: 506 unique published slugs. ~338 live in production (stale Mar 17 commit). Deploy gap: ~163 pages (32% unreachable).

BLOCKER [P0 — DAY 10]: Git locks (.git/HEAD.lock + .git/index.lock) confirmed still present. 786+ uncommitted files. ALL content since Mar 17 is local-only. Jefe action required: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → git add . → git commit → git push.
BLOCKER [P1]: /trading and /trading/learn return 404 — hub page.tsx missing.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: 46 TS errors across 3 files (crypto-arbitrage, crypto-index-funds, structured-data.examples.ts).
CARRY-OVER [P1]: Rate limiter coverage 0/6 core API routes.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 56 published slugs still missing page.tsx files.
TODAY'S AGENT RUNS: standup×2, build×1, design×1, community×1, publish×1, eod×1 = 7 total.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — CLEAR GIT LOCKS + DEPLOY (DAY 10 — CRITICAL): Deploy gap at ~163 pages for 10 days. BTC recovering to $70.3K and Fear & Greed ticking up to 11 suggest sentiment floor may be forming — but our 506 promoted slugs are still trapped. One manual intervention = 48% content increase deployed instantly. This is Day 10; every additional day compounds lost Google indexing opportunity.

PRIORITY 2 — BUILD TIME-SENSITIVE CONTENT: Queue is empty — next build should target: (1) Tax-Loss Harvesting tool page (April 15 deadline now 21 days away — peak search intent starts in 2 weeks), (2) Bitcoin ETF Tracker page (MSBT filing + $2.5B March inflows = hot query space), (3) Fear & Greed Analysis page (49-day Extreme Fear streak is historic — Google-searchable). CLARITY Act explainer also timely with Senate markup approaching.

PRIORITY 3 — EXECUTE SOCIAL CALENDAR: Community drafted 6 posts through Mar 27. Day 49 Fear Record thread, Morgan Stanley MSBT 3-part thread, and tax countdown are the highest-engagement pieces. Push these while narratives are hot. BTC recovery to $70.3K + Fed's Miran at Digital Asset Summit today = additional real-time angles.

STRATEGIC NOTE: Market showing signs of stabilization (BTC +1.1%, total cap +$80B, F&G 8→11). If this is a sentiment inflection, our Fear & Greed content and contrarian guides are perfectly timed — but only if deployed. The 10-day git lock is now the single largest drag on project ROI. Agent output is running at ~$542/day human-equivalent; all of it accumulates locally until deploy.
